name: pr_cep_c_upd_temporal
_finding: CLASS 1 (item C): external UPDATE of an event in a temporal (after/before) join. Drools re-fires the temporal match on ANY update of a participating event (even a no-op value, even an irrelevant field — temporal Behavior nodes are NOT property-reactive). The engine treats it as property-reactive (like a plain beta join) and does NOT re-fire -> UNDER-fires. Deterministic. engine: TJ0 ; oracle: TJ0 TJ0. Controls: no-update PASSES; plain-beta-join no-op update PASSES on both (v_plainjoin_upd); delete PASSES.
drl: rule TJ0 when $a : E0() $b : E0(this before[0ms,100ms] $a) then end
